LanguageData.Sanguophages.description: In the frozen wilds, the Wendigo Cultists whisper dark rites to the ancient spirit of hunger and death. Their bones chilled by bitter winds, they embrace the curse of the Wendigo with fevered devotion. Beware their wild eyes — they hunger not just for flesh, but for souls.
LanguageData.Sanguophages.label: Wendigo Cultsts
